---
name: Whiteboard feature request
about: Suggest a whiteboard feature or update and attach the exported feature-request .canvas.json file
title: "Feature request: "
labels: recommendation, whiteboard
assignees: ""
---

## Board

Which board is this for?

## Page

Link to the page where you made the feature request.

## What changed

Use a short summary in the title, then add any extra detail below.

## Details

If you'd like to include further notes, add them here.

## Attachment

Attach the exported feature-request `.canvas.json` file to this issue.

## Notes

- Local import supports `.canvas.json` directly, so you can bring the file back into the board without converting it first.
- If you want a normal board file again outside the site, rename the file so it ends with `.canvas` instead of `.canvas.json`.
- If you already opened a feature request issue for this board, update that issue instead of opening a new one.
- Feature requests are reviewed before they appear on the live site.
